scripts.test:db-start: bash -c 'STATE=$(docker inspect -f {{.State.Running}} dt-verify-db 2>/dev/null); if [ "$STATE" = true ]; then echo "dt-verify-db already running"; elif [ "$STATE" = false ]; then docker start dt-verify-db; else docker run -d --name dt-verify-db -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=root -e MYSQL_DATABASE=wordpress_test -p 33306:3306 mariadb:11; fi'
scripts.test:install: bash -c './test/install-wp-tests.sh wordpress_test root root 127.0.0.1:33306 latest true'
scripts.test:clean: bash -c 'T=${TMPDIR-/tmp}; T=$(echo $T | sed -e "s/\/$//"); rm -rf "$T/wordpress" "$T/wordpress-tests-lib"; echo "Removed $T/wordpress and $T/wordpress-tests-lib"'
